name: Airtop
description: Scrape and control any site with Airtop

endpoints.label: Create Session Session

fields.label: Profile Name
fields.description: The name of the Airtop profile to load or create

fields.label: Save Profile
fields.description: Whether to automatically save the Airtop profile for this session upon termination

fields.label: Record Session
fields.description: Whether to record the browser session. More details.

fields.label: Idle Timeout
fields.description: Minutes to wait before the session is terminated due to inactivity

fields.label: Proxy
fields.description: Choose how to configure the proxy for this session

fields.label: Proxy Configuration
fields.description: The Airtop-provided configuration to use for the proxy (JSON object; supported keys: country, sticky)

fields.label: Proxy URL
fields.description: The URL of the proxy to use

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: solveCaptcha, extensionIds)

endpoints.description: Create an Airtop browser session

endpoints.label: Save Profile on Termination Session

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

fields.label: Profile Name
fields.description: The name of the Profile to save

endpoints.description: Save in a profile changes made in your browsing session such as cookies and local storage

endpoints.label: Terminate Session Session

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

endpoints.description: Terminate a session

endpoints.label: Close Window Window

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

fields.label: Window ID
fields.description: The ID of the Window to use

endpoints.description: Close a window inside a session

endpoints.label: Create a New Browser Window Window

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

fields.label: URL
fields.description: Initial URL to load in the window. Defaults to https://www.google.com.

fields.label: Get Live View
fields.description: Whether to get the URL of the window's Live View

fields.label: Include Navigation Bar
fields.description: Whether to include the navigation bar in the Live View. When enabled, the navigation bar will be visible allowing you to navigate between pages.

fields.label: Screen Resolution
fields.description: The screen resolution of the Live View. Setting a resolution will force the window to open at that specific size.

fields.label: Disable Resize
fields.description: Whether to disable the window from being resized in the Live View

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: waitUntil)

endpoints.description: Create a new browser window inside a session. Can load a URL when created.

endpoints.label: Get Live View Window

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

fields.label: Window ID
fields.description: The ID of the Window to use

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: includeNavigationBar, screenResolution, disableResize)

endpoints.description: Get information about a browser window, including the live view URL

endpoints.label: List Windows Window

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

endpoints.description: List all browser windows in a session

endpoints.label: Load URL Window

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

fields.label: Window ID
fields.description: The ID of the Window to use

fields.label: URL
fields.description: URL to load in the window

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: waitUntil)

endpoints.description: Load a URL in an existing window

endpoints.label: Take Screenshot Window

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

fields.label: Window ID
fields.description: The ID of the Window to use

fields.label: Output Binary Image
fields.description: Whether to output the image as a binary file instead of a base64 encoded string

endpoints.description: Take a screenshot of the current window

endpoints.label: Delete File

fields.label: File ID
fields.description: ID of the file to delete

endpoints.description: Delete an uploaded file

endpoints.label: Get File

fields.label: File ID
fields.description: ID of the file to retrieve

fields.label: Output Binary File
fields.description: Whether to output the file in binary format if the file is ready for download

endpoints.description: Get a details of an uploaded file

endpoints.label: Get Many File

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Session IDs
fields.description: Comma-separated list of Session IDs to filter files by. When empty, all files from all sessions will be returned.

fields.label: Output Files in Single Item
fields.description: Whether to output one item containing all files or output each file as a separate item

endpoints.description: Get details of multiple uploaded files

endpoints.label: Query Page Extraction

fields.label: Session Mode
fields.description: Choose between creating a new session or using an existing one

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

fields.label: Window ID
fields.description: The ID of the Window to use

fields.label: URL
fields.description: URL to load in the window

fields.label: Profile Name
fields.description: The name of the Airtop profile to load or create

fields.label: Auto-Terminate Session
fields.description: Whether to terminate the session after the operation is complete. When disabled, you must manually terminate the session. By default, idle sessions timeout after 10 minutes

fields.label: Prompt
fields.placeholder: e.g. Is there a login form in this page?
fields.description: The prompt to query the page content

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: outputSchema, parseJsonOutput, includeVisualAnalysis)

endpoints.description: Query a page to extract data or ask a question given the data on the page

endpoints.label: Query Page with Pagination Extraction

fields.label: Session Mode
fields.description: Choose between creating a new session or using an existing one

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

fields.label: Window ID
fields.description: The ID of the Window to use

fields.label: URL
fields.description: URL to load in the window

fields.label: Profile Name
fields.description: The name of the Airtop profile to load or create

fields.label: Auto-Terminate Session
fields.description: Whether to terminate the session after the operation is complete. When disabled, you must manually terminate the session. By default, idle sessions timeout after 10 minutes

fields.label: Prompt
fields.placeholder: e.g. Extract all the product names and prices
fields.description: The prompt to extract data from the pages

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: outputSchema, parseJsonOutput, interactionMode, paginationMode)

endpoints.description: Extract content from paginated or dynamically loaded pages

endpoints.label: Smart Scrape Extraction

fields.label: Session Mode
fields.description: Choose between creating a new session or using an existing one

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

fields.label: Window ID
fields.description: The ID of the Window to use

fields.label: URL
fields.description: URL to load in the window

fields.label: Profile Name
fields.description: The name of the Airtop profile to load or create

fields.label: Auto-Terminate Session
fields.description: Whether to terminate the session after the operation is complete. When disabled, you must manually terminate the session. By default, idle sessions timeout after 10 minutes

endpoints.description: Scrape a page and return the data as markdown

endpoints.label: Click an Element Interaction

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

fields.label: Window ID
fields.description: The ID of the Window to use

fields.label: Element Description
fields.placeholder: e.g. the green "save" button at the top of the page
fields.description: A specific description of the element to execute the interaction on

fields.label: Click Type
fields.description: The type of click to perform. Defaults to left click.

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: visualScope, waitForNavigation)

endpoints.description: Execute a click on an element given a description

endpoints.label: Fill Form Interaction

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

fields.label: Window ID
fields.description: The ID of the Window to use

fields.label: Form Data
fields.description: The information to fill into the form written in natural language

endpoints.description: Fill a form with the provided information

endpoints.label: Hover on an Element Interaction

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

fields.label: Window ID
fields.description: The ID of the Window to use

fields.label: Element Description
fields.placeholder: e.g. the rounded user profile image at the top right of the page
fields.description: A specific description of the element to execute the interaction on

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: visualScope, waitForNavigation)

endpoints.description: Execute a hover action on an element given a description

endpoints.label: Scroll Interaction

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

fields.label: Window ID
fields.description: The ID of the Window to use

fields.label: Scroll Mode
fields.description: Choose the mode of scrolling

fields.label: Element Description
fields.placeholder: e.g. the page section titled "Contact Us"
fields.description: A natural language description of the element to scroll to

fields.label: Scroll To Edge
fields.description: The direction to scroll to. When 'Scroll By' is defined, 'Scroll To Edge' action will be executed first, then 'Scroll By' action. (JSON object; supported keys: edgeValues, edgeValues.yAxis, edgeValues.xAxis)

fields.label: Scroll By
fields.description: The amount to scroll by. When 'Scroll To Edge' is defined, 'Scroll By' action will be executed after 'Scroll To Edge'. (JSON object; supported keys: scrollValues, scrollValues.yAxis, scrollValues.xAxis)

fields.label: Scrollable Area
fields.description: Scroll within an element on the page

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: visualScope, waitForNavigation)

endpoints.description: Execute a scroll action on the page

endpoints.label: Type Interaction

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: The ID of the Session to use

fields.label: Window ID
fields.description: The ID of the Window to use

fields.label: Text
fields.description: The text to type into the browser window

fields.label: Press Enter Key
fields.description: Whether to press the Enter key after typing the text

fields.label: Element Description
fields.placeholder: e.g. the search box at the top of the page
fields.description: A specific description of the element to execute the interaction on

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: visualScope, waitForNavigation)

endpoints.description: Execute a Type action on an element given a description
